nodes.label: Audit — Admin + Profile + Onboarding + Offboarding
nodes.rationale: 11 pages audited: 2 conformant, 1 minor, 8 non-conformant

nodes.label: Audit — Auth + Dashboard
nodes.rationale: 9 pages audited: 3 conformant, 4 minor, 2 missing/incorrect

nodes.label: Audit — Forms + Evaluations
nodes.rationale: 8 pages audited: 3 conformant, 3 minor, 2 missing/incorrect

nodes.label: Re-audit 3 — Profile, Onboarding, Offboarding
nodes.rationale: Branch: refactor, Commit: b85f5d7. 6/7 items conformant, 1 partial. Verdict: PARTIALLY FIXED

nodes.label: NX-RH Seed Execution Report
nodes.rationale: Executed 2026-05-06, exit 0. 12 collections seeded, 11 test accounts. Idempotent upsert-only.

nodes.label: NX-RH Seed Plan
nodes.rationale: Defines ground rules, execution order, and data schema for all MongoDB seed collections

nodes.label: AdminHubPage (S-26)
nodes.rationale: ✅ Conformant — 6 navigation cards pointing to correct screens

nodes.label: AdminLdapPage (S-28)
nodes.rationale: ✅ with ⚠️ minor: sync tab shows only synced/errors; spec expects N créés/M mis à jour/K ignorés + last sync timestamp

nodes.label: AdminConfigPage (S-27)
nodes.rationale: ❌ Non-conformant — impl uses key/value table + individual CRUD modals instead of sections (General/SMTP/Feature flags/Security) + PATCH /api/admin/config/batch

nodes.label: AdminAuditPage (S-29)
nodes.rationale: ❌ Non-conformant — export CSV endpoint mismatch; filter params (actor/targetType vs actorId); no error state

nodes.label: AdminUsersPage (S-30)
nodes.rationale: ❌ Non-conformant — missing authSource column, archive date, authSource/inactive filters, RGPD banner, Force Disable action

nodes.label: AdminUsersImportPage (S-40)
nodes.rationale: ❌ Non-conformant — no dryRun mode, CSV parser only handles comma, limited columns, wrong endpoint path

nodes.label: AdminFormsImportPage (S-41)
nodes.rationale: ❌ Non-conformant — file dropzone only (no paste JSON tab), no formType validation, no rich preview, wrong endpoint and redirect

nodes.label: ProfilePage (S-31)
nodes.rationale: ❌ original audit: formType filter missing, manager field absent. Fixed in re-audit 3 (branch: refactor, commit b85f5d7)

nodes.label: OnboardingPage (S-33)
nodes.rationale: ❌ original: 'Passer cette étape' visible on step 0; team step showed dept colleagues only. Partially fixed in re-audit 3 — step 4 still incorrectly hidden

nodes.label: OffboardingPage (S-23)
nodes.rationale: ❌ original: 'Modifier statut' missing in row ⋮ menu, no RBAC. Fixed in re-audit 3.

nodes.label: OffboardingDetailPage (S-24)
nodes.rationale: ✅ Conformant — 2-column layout, clickable checklist, HR notes, status change, admin delete modal

nodes.label: LoginPage (S-01)
nodes.rationale: ✅ Conformant with ⚠️ minor: LDAP CTA not explicitly 'Secondary' style as spec

nodes.label: LoginLdapPage (S-02)
nodes.rationale: ✅ Conformant with ⚠️ minor: 503 server unavailable message added (non-specified, acceptable)

nodes.label: AuthGuard
nodes.rationale: ✅ Conformant with ⚠️ minor: no role-specific redirect beyond fallback /

nodes.label: AuthContext
nodes.rationale: ✅ Conformant with ⚠️ minor: logout uses window.location.href full reload instead of SPA navigation; no 'remember me' handling

nodes.label: DashboardPage (S-04/S-05)
nodes.rationale: ✅ Conformant — role-based routing to dedicated sub-components, loading wrapper present

nodes.label: DashboardEmployeePage
nodes.rationale: ⚠️ Missing: GET /api/campaigns?status=active, GET /api/evaluations?campaignId=null&evaluateeId=me; active campaign link; Mes demandes card

nodes.label: DashboardManagerPage
nodes.rationale: ⚠️ Cards not sorted by deadline; deadline reminders hardcoded 0; scope=my_team unverifiable on page

nodes.label: DashboardHrPage
nodes.rationale: ⚠️ Export PDF CTA disabled; KPI 'Évals à signer' hardcoded to 0

nodes.label: DashboardAdminPage
nodes.rationale: ⚠️ Recent activity is placeholder S11; GET /api/config absent

nodes.label: FormsPage (S-07)
nodes.rationale: ✅ Conformant with ⚠️ minor: campaign filter missing (spec S-13 requires it)

nodes.label: FormDetailPage (S-08)
nodes.rationale: ✅ Conformant with ⚠️ minor: drag & drop absent (spec S-15), only up/down buttons

nodes.label: FormNewPage
nodes.rationale: ⚠️ Missing campaign/anonymous fields; phase types wrong (employee/manager/both/all vs self/n-1/objectives/aspirations/all); question types incomplete

nodes.label: EvaluationsPage (S-16)
nodes.rationale: ⚠️ Missing dept filter, multi-status filter; row actions missing Reassign + Expire

nodes.label: EvaluationDetailPage (S-17)
nodes.rationale: ✅ with ❌: Mode B missing 'Revoir →' button; Mode C stepper 6 steps instead of 5; Mode D title wrong; PUT used instead of PATCH /api/evaluations/:id

nodes.label: EvaluationNewPage
nodes.rationale: ❌ Still a stub ('À implémenter')

nodes.label: MongoDB users Collection
nodes.rationale: 25 documents (14 legacy + 11 NX-RH). Fields: role, department, managerId, authSource, isActive, offboardingStatus

nodes.label: MongoDB sectors Collection
nodes.rationale: 3 sectors: Innovation (#17A8D4), Fonctions Support (#7C3AED), Commercial & Client (#F97316)

nodes.label: MongoDB campaigns Collection
nodes.rationale: 4 documents: N-2/2024 archived, N-1/2025 closed, 2026 active. Fields: status, targetDepartments, previousCampaignId, enableN1Context, n1VisibleToEmployee, objectivesFormId

nodes.label: MongoDB forms Collection
nodes.rationale: 8 documents. 6 NX-RH types: self_evaluation, manager_evaluation, upward_feedback, objectives, mobility_request, promotion_request

nodes.label: MongoDB evaluations Collection
nodes.rationale: 35 documents covering all statuses: assigned(23), submitted(4), in_progress(1), reviewed(1), validated(1), signed_manager(1), signed_evaluatee(1), signed_hr(1), archived(1), expired(1)

nodes.label: MongoDB offboardingrequests Collection
nodes.rationale: 2 documents: in_progress (Nicolas Rousseau/resignation) and completed (Antoine Faure/termination). 5-step checklist each.

nodes.label: MongoDB events Collection
nodes.rationale: 16 documents. Types: deadline|interview|meeting|feedback|campaign. Jan–Mar 2026 campaign calendar.

nodes.label: MongoDB resources Collection
nodes.rationale: 6 documents. Types: pdf|xlsx|docx|pptx, statuses: draft/published

nodes.label: MongoDB notifications Collection
nodes.rationale: 49 documents. Types include: eval_assigned, eval_submitted, eval_reviewed, eval_signed_*, campaign_launched/closed, request_*, reminder, system

nodes.label: MongoDB auditlogs Collection
nodes.rationale: 22 documents. Actions: login, login_failed, status_change, evaluation_update, reassigned, bulk_action, campaign_*, offboard*, gdpr_anonymize

nodes.label: MongoDB configs Collection
nodes.rationale: 5 documents. Key entries: ldap.enabled=true, ldap.baseDn, ldap.url, app.features={offboarding,analytics,objectives}

nodes.label: MongoDB mailtemplates Collection
nodes.rationale: 9 documents

nodes.label: Seed Script (seed-full.js)
nodes.rationale: Idempotent upsert-only seed. Run: node database/seed-full.js or npm run seed:full. Exit 0 verified 2026-05-06.

nodes.label: Admin Role
nodes.rationale: Alice Moreau (admin@nx-rh.fr). Full access to all admin pages and user management.

nodes.label: HR Role
nodes.rationale: Hugo Lambert (rh@nx-rh.fr). Access to offboarding, evaluations, HR dashboard.

nodes.label: Director Role
nodes.rationale: Claire Bernard (direction@nx-rh.fr). Executive-level, manages managers.

nodes.label: Manager Role
nodes.rationale: Julien Robert (manager-it, local) and Marie Dubois (manager-marketing, LDAP). Manages team evaluations.

nodes.label: Employee Role
nodes.rationale: 5 employees: Élodie Martin (in-progress evals), Thomas Petit, Sarah Leroy, Antoine Faure (inactive), Camille Girard (LDAP), Nicolas Rousseau (offboarding).

nodes.label: Self Evaluation Form Type
nodes.rationale: Questions: rating/text/yes_no/scale/objective_item. Linked to campaign 2026.

nodes.label: Manager Evaluation Form Type
nodes.rationale: Questions: rating/text/yes_no. Linked to campaign 2026.

nodes.label: Upward Feedback Form Type
nodes.rationale: Questions: rating/text. isAnonymous=true. Linked to campaign 2026.

nodes.label: Objectives Form Type
nodes.rationale: Questions: objective_item/text. Linked to campaign 2026 as objectivesFormId.

nodes.label: Mobility Request Form Type
nodes.rationale: Template form (campaignId=null). Questions: choice/text/yes_no.

nodes.label: Promotion Request Form Type
nodes.rationale: Template form (campaignId=null). Questions: text/yes_no.
